description:
'''HexD''' is an [[Internet music|Internet]] [[microgenre]] of [[hip-hop]] and [[electronic music]] that emerged in the late 2010s to early 2020s, characterized by heavy use of [[Bitcrusher|bitcrushing]] mixed with sped-up and [[Pitch shifting|pitched]]-up vocals, resulting in a distorted "[[Glitch|glitched]]-out" sound. 

The [[Internet rap]] collective [[Reptilian Club Boyz]] and rapper [[Hi-C (rapper, born 1998)|Hi-C]] who founded the group, have been noted as influential in the development of hexD. Other notable artists include Fax Gang, ZBITO18 and the group HELLOKITTYWAFFENDIVISION.
